div.p: Data flow from Ashley source systems to Power BI consumers
SupplyChain_Warehouse Fabric F256 · 100% T-SQL · v9 Medallion
Claude Code + Fabric MCP AI-assisted code generation
Enterprise_Lakehouse (Lake A) Single source of truth OneLake shortcuts from all sources
bronze schema Raw mirror · brz_* 26 tables
silver schema Cleaned + SCD2 · slv_* 26 tables
gold schema Dims + Facts · dim_* / fact_* 19 tables
meta schema (brain) sp_registry, dq_rules, sp_run_history, sp_lineage 6 tables
dbo schema (engines) usp_log_run, usp_check_dq, usp_build_lineage Shared utilities
Teams alerts DQ failures, pipeline errors
T-SQL 3-part name SELECT from [Lake_A].[dbo].[*] Same workspace · zero copy
